title: Secure inter-agent communication and memory integrity
source: OWASP Agentic ASI06 Memory Poisoning + ASI07 Insecure Inter-Agent Communication
description: Team messages parsed from free-text agent output without integrity verification. A prompt-injected agent could craft malicious messages targeting other team members.
proposed_changes: Add sanitize_agent_message() stripping injection patterns. Add message integrity hashing. Wrap inter-agent messages through wrap_untrusted_content(). Add rate limiting per agent.
